Component: Root.tsx (Shadow DOM host + SolidJS mount)
Virtual Node Load Flow (Esc dismisses, fetch continues)
FR-001: Default to command palette mode

Rationale: uFuzzy chosen for bundle size (1.2kb vs 24kb fuse.js)
Rationale: Manual attachShadow over solid-element (no custom element overhead)
Rationale: Custom focus trap (~25 lines) over library dependency
Rationale: Custom two-tier shortcut registry (global + focus-scoped)
Rationale: Two Vite build targets (library ESM/CJS + userscript IIFE)
Rationale: Dot-notation localStorage key schema for category grouping
Rationale: Sequential branch numbering as default strategy
